Personal website

Made with eleventy, hosting on github, deploying with netlify

Started as a homebase for the job search, now it’s transforming into a way to talk to local orgs about feelance design and web work.

Documentation

  • Site Architecture - Visual diagrams of the build and deployment process
  • Taxonomy Map - Complete breakdown of site taxonomies (tags, artists, venues, peaks, etc.)
  • Third-Party Libraries - All dependencies and external libraries
